title: Replay
description: Ananke deterministic replay — an initial WorldState plus a sequence of command frames. Replaying all frames against the initial state must reproduce the exact final state (same tick, same entity conditions, same RNG sequence).

_schema.description: Schema discrimination tag — always "replay" for Replay snapshots.

initialState.description: The WorldState at tick 0 (or whatever tick the recording began). Must itself be a valid world snapshot.

frames.description: Ordered sequence of command frames. Frame indices correspond to ticks relative to initialState.tick.

tick.description: Absolute simulation tick this frame was recorded at.

commands.description: Commands dispatched during this tick. May be empty.

Command.title: Command
Command.description: A single world-mutating command dispatched to stepWorld(). Commands are discriminated by their `kind` field.
